environment.frontend: Vite TS entry on 127.0.0.1:5176 during test

entrypoints.api_base: frontend/src/shared/api/client.ts uses VITE_API_BASE ?? /api; Vite proxy VITE_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8022

step2: pnpm --dir frontend test => 9 files / 68 tests passed
e2e: POST /resumes/local-import for data/input/resumes/1337_【AI全栈工程师】代先生_一年以内.pdf

notes: First live attempt returned malformed JSON.
Second accepted 7 jobs before minimumRoleCount gate was added.

docling_quality: Zhang confidence remains 0.62 due LLM/heuristic blend; P2 quality follow-up.

public_email_compliance.live_note: No productized public-site extraction endpoint was available in TS page for a non-fake live public email ingestion run.
public_email_compliance.send_gate: outreach create/send blocks pending_compliance_review in tests/test_product_loop_api.py

delivery.simulate_false: 503 email_delivery is not active; real send is disabled

frontend_refresh.gap: Project detail page did not automatically fetch/display outreach history; /outreach/history API persisted it.

postgres_pool.long_llm_db_session: BP route calls LLM before opening project DB session

bugs.root_cause: No BP initialization API / no job matrix persistence / v2 prompts absent
bugs.fix: Added initialize-from-bp route, job matrix columns, v2 prompts, frontend registry/types/table projection

bugs.root_cause: LLM JSON malformed and only single parse attempt
bugs.fix: Added schema-safe retry_prompt loop up to 3 attempts, compact JSON repair prompt, minimumRoleCount gate

bugs.root_cause: Parser metadata not persisted; generic headings used as names
bugs.fix: Parser last_metadata, raw_payload parser/provider/parser_confidence/degraded_reason, filename/name-label heuristics, LLM+heuristic merge

bugs.root_cause: Public web emails were not automatically pending compliance review
bugs.fix: Public/open web/source scrape email sources now require compliance review; resume_file/manual/referral exempt

bugs.root_cause: LLM draft could omit candidate full name or strategy tag while still accepted
bugs.fix: Reject LLM draft unless candidate.name and strategy_tag are present; deterministic fallback preserves contract

regressions.description: Full pytest initially regressed two outreach tests after v2 prompt migration
regressions.resolution: Added LLM draft acceptance guard; full pytest now passes

limitations: System python is 3.10.12; all project commands used .venv Python 3.12.13.
Mailtrap SMTP credentials are unset, so no real Mailtrap sandbox delivery was attempted.
No productized frontend public-site extraction flow exists for live open-web email ingestion; backend compliance contract is covered by tests.
Project detail page does not display outreach history automatically after refresh.
Weekly report endpoint returned 404 because no weekly report was generated in this run.

P0: Configure MAILTRAP_SMTP_HOST/PORT/USERNAME/PASSWORD/FROM for sandbox-only real send, then rerun /outreach/send simulate=false.
Add productized public-site email extraction flow that writes extraction_method/source_url/evidence/compliance_status and exposes it in TS page.
P1: Persist manual edit intent separately from draft body.
Expose outreach history on project detail refresh.
Add observability events for BP LLM repair attempts without logging secrets.
P2: Improve resume LLM structured extraction for 张载德 confidence/name without relying on filename fallback.
Add a weekly report generation step to remove expected latest-report 404.
